variants: Gargi Sonawane is a dedicated paleontologist currently residing in Roseglade Station. Originally from Willowfell Outskirts, her love for fossils led her to become an active member of the Hardpan Fossil Hunters. She authored the Ironseed Stabilizer Guide, which has become an essential resource for fossil preservation methods. In recognition of her outstanding contributions to the field, Gargi received the Frostwillow Plaque, a notable honor. Her expertise continues to inspire fossil enthusiasts in her community.

With a passion for knowledge-sharing, she authored the Ironseed Stabilizer Guide, providing vital techniques for fossil hunters. Her hard work and dedication were recognized when she was awarded the Frostwillow Plaque, a testament to her influence in the field of paleontology. Gargi consistently seeks to engage and educate others in her area.
